properties.statement: Accepts items, k, a primary key callable, and an optional tiebreak_key callable.
Returns a list of at most k items ordered best to worst.
Items are sorted by key descending (higher key ranks higher).
When primary keys tie and tiebreak_key is given, it sorts ascending by that secondary key.
Ties are broken stably, preserving original order when keys are equal.
Returns an empty list when k is less than or equal to 0.
Returns fewer than k items when len(items) is smaller than k.
